center.name: Emmet Reid Blake
center.summary: Emmet Reid Blake是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rufous-fronted antthrush，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-fronted antthrush (Formicarius rufifrons) is a species of bird in the family Formicariidae. It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Peru.Remsen, J
